brand.name: Starlog
brand.tagline: One assistant thread for capture, planning, review, and follow-up.

assistant.label: Assistant
assistant.description: Persistent thread for commands, confirmations, and returned cards.

library.label: Library
library.description: Notes, captures, saved sources, search, and artifact history.

planner.label: Planner
planner.description: Tasks, calendar, time blocks, and briefings.

assistant.emptyBody: The assistant thread keeps the answer, the next move, and the supporting tool details in one place.
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask Starlog to capture, plan, review, or follow up...

auth.readyStatus: Single-user passphrase access is required before Starlog opens.
auth.signedOutBody: Use one passphrase to unlock the assistant, library, planner, and review surfaces.

helper.workspaceSubtitle: Capture quickly, review recent items, and hand them into Assistant or Library. Diagnostics stay available but secondary.
